mdSummary:
# ToggleGroup

Group of toggles with single or multiple selection.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/toggle-group

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ToggleGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | Type | `ToggleGroupType` | `ToggleGroupType.Single` |  |
| ToggleGroup | Variant | `ToggleGroupVariant` | `ToggleGroupVariant.Default` |  |
| ToggleGroup | Size | `ToggleGroupSize` | `ToggleGroupSize.Default` |  |
| ToggleGroup | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | SelectedValues | `IEnumerable<string>?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | SelectedValuesChanged | `EventCallback<IEnumerable<string>>` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | PressEffect | `Button.ButtonPressEffect` | `Button.ButtonPressEffect.None` | Visual feedback when the item is pressed. Default is None. |
| ToggleGroupItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | Context | `ToggleGroup.ToggleGroupContext` | `default!` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (ToggleGroup) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ToggleGroupItem) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)
- `SelectedValuesChanged` (`EventCallback<IEnumerable<string>>`)

## Sub-components
- `ToggleGroupItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`ToggleGroup.ToggleGroupContext`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<ToggleGroup />
```
